note: The specmap orphan ratchet (PLAYBOOK #phase2, flipped 2026-06-10; expanded Phase 6 same day; VIBEVM-SPEC.md scanned + vibe-cli gated 2026-06-12, closing DBT-0019). A crate NOT listed in `exempt` is gated. Remaining exemptions and why: vibe-mcp (M1.7 surface, no module PROP — DBT-0020 tracks the missing spec home), vibe-graph + vibe-llm (stub crates), vibe-wire (generated code — the JTD schema is the taggable unit), xtask (internal tooling binary), specmark + specmark-grammar (the tag bootstrap pair cannot depend on specmark to carry scope! markers — tagging them is a scanner-level feature, not a macro one).
